body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. TestStopStaleDiskEntry_PreservesLivePIDWithFreshClaim starts a real controllable subprocess, writes a running disk record with that PID and a fresh claim lease, invokes stopStaleDiskEntry, and proves the subprocess remains alive, the claim remains in_progress, and the record is not marked stopped.","coverage":"Child \"server: preserve fresh live disk-record workers before cleanup\" AC1 covers this directly."},{"parent_ac":"2. TestStopStaleDiskEntry_ReapsLivePIDWithReclaimableStaleClaim proves the same path terminates the process tree, releases the stale claim, emits bead.stopped, and marks the record stopped when the lease is safely reclaimable.","coverage":"Child \"server: reap only reclaimable stale disk-record workers\" AC1 and AC2 cover this directly."},{"parent_ac":"3. TestSupervisorReconcile_LiveDiskOnlyAttemptSurvivesTicks removes or omits the manager handle for a real live managed-attempt fixture, runs at least three ReconcileAt ticks, and proves the process and fresh claim survive without a replacement duplicate.","coverage":"Child \"supervisor: retain live disk-only managed attempts during reconcile\" AC1 and AC2 cover this directly."},{"parent_ac":"4. Preserving a live disk-only worker emits a structured supervisor/lifecycle diagnostic containing worker ID, PID, bead ID, and preservation reason.","coverage":"Child \"server: preserve fresh live disk-record workers before cleanup\" AC2 covers direct stopStaleDiskEntry diagnostics; child \"supervisor: retain live disk-only managed attempts during reconcile\" AC3 covers supervisor disk-only diagnostics."},{"parent_ac":"5. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... -run \"Test(StopStaleDiskEntry_(PreservesLivePIDWithFreshClaim|ReapsLivePIDWithReclaimableStaleClaim)|SupervisorReconcile_LiveDiskOnlyAttemptSurvivesTicks)\" passes.","coverage":"Covered by child-specific focused gates: preserve child AC3, reap child AC3, supervisor child AC4. The combined regex is intentionally decomposed across children."},{"parent_ac":"6. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... passes.","coverage":"Preserve child AC4, reap child AC4, and supervisor child AC5 each require cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... passes."},{"parent_ac":"7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.","coverage":"Preserve child AC5, reap child AC5, and supervisor child AC6 each require lefthook run pre-commit passes."}],"child_ids":["ddx-8c8675ba","ddx-5fc699b5","ddx-1bc702ec"],"rationale":"Split into three independently executable server-worker units: the direct fresh-live preservation branch, the reclaimable-stale cleanup branch, and supervisor reconciliation for disk-only live attempts. This keeps each bead focused on one testable behavior while preserving the parent non-scope constraints, regression reference ddx-57faa17c, incident label, dependency state, and verification gates."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
